major_issues: MASSIVE REDUNDANCY: Files 00, 01, 02 all cover nearly identical FVM introduction material
fvm vs fvc explanation repeated in 01, 02, 05, 06
Best practices on mesh quality duplicated in 03, 07
missing_content: No dedicated file for discretization schemes comparison table
No dedicated troubleshooting guide with error messages
No visual diagrams for mesh quality parameters
strengths: Excellent use of examples and calculations
Good integration of theory with OpenFOAM implementation

files.00_Overview.md: TRANSFORM into 'Quick Start Navigation' file. Remove all detailed theory (move to 01). Keep ONLY: (1) High-level 'Why FVM matters' bullet points, (2) Visual Mermaid workflow diagram, (3) Mapping table (FVM concept → OpenFOAM files), (4) Module structure roadmap. Target length: 50% of current. Purpose: Get reader excited, provide roadmap, then push to 01.
files.01_Introduction.md: CONSOLIDATE all 'FVM Basics' theory here. Merge content from 00 (conservation laws), 02 (flux balance, storage approach). Keep: (1) PDE→algebraic transformation, (2) FVM advantages table, (3) Basic discretization of each term (convection, diffusion, temporal), (4) Intro to matrix concept. REMOVE: Advanced Navier-Stokes implementation (move to 02), detailed OpenFOAM code examples (move to 06). Add: Learning objectives at top. Target: 'Core Theory' foundation file.
files.02_Fundamental_Concepts.md: RESTRUCTURE into 'Physics & Governing Equations in FVM Context'. Keep: (1) Conservation equations (mass, momentum, energy) with FVM discretization shown, (2) Pressure-velocity coupling detailed explanation, (3) General transport equation, (4) fvm vs fvc conceptual explanation. MOVE: Cell-centered storage basics to 03, flux balance water analogy to 01, matrix assembly preview to 05. This file should answer 'What equations are we discretizing and why?'
files.03_Spatial_Discretization.md: KEEP as-is but CLEAN UP. Remove: Matrix coefficient examples (move to 05), solver recommendations (create summary table only). ADD: (1) Prerequisites section ('Read 02 first'), (2) Learning objectives, (3) Troubleshooting table for spatial schemes errors. Enhance: Non-orthogonal correction example is excellent—keep. This is the 'How to discretize space' technical file.
files.04_Temporal_Discretization.md: CONSOLIDATE and SIMPLIFY. Remove: PISO/PIMPLE details (move to 02—they belong with pressure-velocity coupling), matrix contribution (move to 05). KEEP: Time schemes (Euler, backward, Crank-Nicolson), CFL number explanation, Co calculation examples. MERGE: Algorithm selection table (SIMPLE/PISO/PIMPLE) into 02. This file should be purely about time integration.
files.05_Matrix_Assembly.md: EXPAND and CONSOLIDATE all matrix content. Absorb: Coefficient calculations from 03, fvm vs fvc matrix implications from 01/02/06, temporal contribution from 04, BC effects from 06. ADD: (1) Visual sparse matrix structure diagram, (2) Debugging matrix problems checklist, (3) More step-by-step coefficient calculation examples. This should be the 'Everything about the [A][x]=[b] system' file.
files.06_OpenFOAM_Implementation.md: FOCUS on code. Remove: Theoretical explanations (should reference 01-05), fvm vs fvc theory (in 02/05), SIMPLE/PISO algorithm theory (in 02). KEEP: (1) Core classes API reference (fvMesh, volFields, fvMatrix), (2) Code examples for each equation type, (3) Custom solver template, (4) Configuration file examples. ADD: (1) 'How to read OpenFOAM source code' section, (2) Common compile errors with fixes. Purpose: Bridge theory → practice.
files.07_Best_Practices.md: REENGINEER into 'Troubleshooting & Settings Guide'. Move: Mesh quality details into 03 (where non-orthogonality is discussed), Y+ calculation to dedicated 'Boundary Conditions' module (not FVM). FOCUS on: (1) Divergence troubleshooting table, (2) Scheme selection flowchart, (3) Solver tuning guide, (4) Convergence monitoring. ADD: (1) '10 most common errors' with solutions, (2) Performance optimization tips. Make it actionable.
files.08_Exercises.md: EXPAND with progressive difficulty. Current exercises are good but: (1) Add 'Exercise 0: Warm-up quiz' (basic concepts check), (2) Add more OpenFOAM debug exercises (given log file, diagnose problem), (3) Add 'Mini-project: Complete case setup' with solution. STRUCTURE: Level 1 (theory), Level 2 (calculations), Level 3 (OpenFOAM debugging), Level 4 (case setup).

global_strategy.phase_1_consolidation: Merge redundant FVM basics into 01. 01 becomes 'FVM Theory Foundation', 02 becomes 'Governing Equations in FVM', 03-05 remain focused technical files. 00 transforms to navigation roadmap.
global_strategy.phase_2_removal: Remove duplicate content: fvm/fvc from 01/02/06 (keep conceptual in 02, practical in 06), SIMPLE/PISO from 04/07 (consolidate in 02), solver details from 03/07 (keep in 05), mesh basics from 03/07 (keep in 03 with reference from 07).
global_strategy.phase_3_restructuring: Each file gets clear single purpose: 00=Roadmap, 01=Theory, 02=Physics/Eqns, 03=Spatial, 04=Temporal, 05=Matrix, 06=Code, 07=Troubleshooting, 08=Practice. Add cross-references between files.
global_strategy.phase_4_enhancement: Add missing elements: Learning objectives, prerequisites, troubleshooting tables, visual diagrams (Mermaid/ASCII), exercise solutions, debug workflows. Ensure 3W framework (What/Why/How) in every section.
priority_actions: CRITICAL: Fix 00/01/02 overlap—readers get confused seeing same content 3 times
HIGH: Move all fvm vs fvc theory to 02, practical usage to 06, remove from elsewhere
HIGH: Consolidate SIMPLE/PISO/PIMPLE into 02 (theory), keep only config in 04/07
MEDIUM: Move mesh quality from 07 to 03, keep reference link
MEDIUM: Move matrix assembly scattered pieces into 05
LOW: Expand exercises with progressive difficulty levels

current_scores.00_Overview.md: 75% - Good structure, missing learning objectives, some redundancy
current_scores.01_Introduction.md: 70% - Strong content, redundant with 00/02, missing troubleshooting
current_scores.04_Temporal_Discretization.md: 75% - Good temporal coverage, mixed with coupling algorithms
current_scores.05_Matrix_Assembly.md: 80% - Strong core, needs consolidation from other files
current_scores.06_OpenFOAM_Implementation.md: 70% - Good code, mixed with theory, needs debugging section
current_scores.07_Best_Practices.md: 65% - Useful but scattered, needs focus on troubleshooting
current_scores.08_Exercises.md: 60% - Good exercises, needs more structure and variety
